'''chapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:leftward|leftward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leftward|leftward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chapate|chapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chapatesher|chapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chapatesherĂ«m|chapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chapatero|chapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chapateshĂ«|chapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chapateshĂ«m|chapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichapatero|gokichapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichapateshĂ«|gokichapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichapateshĂ«m|gokichapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochapankerom|gochapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochapankeshĂ«|gochapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochapankeshĂ«m|gochapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochapankeya|gochapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chapaterom|chapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chapatemu|chapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chapateya|chapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichapaterom|gokichapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichapatemu|gokichapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichapateya|gokichapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chapapate|chapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chapapatesher|chapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chapapatesherĂ«m|chapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chapapatero|chapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chapapateshĂ«|chapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chapapateshĂ«m|chapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichapapatero|gokichapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichapapateshĂ«|gokichapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichapapateshĂ«m|gokichapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochapapankerom|gochapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochapapankeshĂ«|gochapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochapapankeshĂ«m|gochapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochapapankeya|gochapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chapapaterom|chapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chapapatemu|chapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chapapateya|chapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichapapaterom|gokichapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichapapatemu|gokichapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichapapateya|gokichapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠpĂŠte|chĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠpĂŠtesher|chĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠpĂŠtero|chĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠpĂŠtero|gokichĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠpĂŠterom|chĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠpĂŠtemu|chĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠpĂŠteya|chĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠpĂŠterom|gokichĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠpĂŠteya|gokichĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafpafte|chafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafpaftesher|chafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafpaftesherĂ«m|chafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafpaftero|chafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafpafteshĂ«|chafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafpafteshĂ«m|chafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafpaftero|gokichafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafpafteshĂ«|gokichafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafpafteshĂ«m|gokichafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafpafnkerom|gochafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafpafnkeshĂ«|gochafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafpafnkeshĂ«m|gochafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafpafnkeya|gochafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafpafterom|chafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafpaftemu|chafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafpafteya|chafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafpafterom|gokichafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafpaftemu|gokichafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafpafteya|gokichafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
